reason: This is a standard Arabic religious condolence phrase ('We belong to Allah and to Him we shall return') followed by what appears to be a death announcement. Contains no ISIS-specific content or support.
original_post: * * انا لله وان اليه لراجعون انتقل الى رحمة الله تعالى العم عضيب شليويح العصيمي العم شليويح عضيب…
